scripts.build: npm run build -w @finsphere/shared && npm run build -w @finsphere/api && npm run build -w @finsphere/web
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w @finsphere/web && npm run lint -w @finsphere/api
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @finsphere/shared && npm run typecheck -w @finsphere/api && npm run typecheck -w @finsphere/web
scripts.test: npm run test -w @finsphere/shared && npm run test -w @finsphere/api
